hook: A hummingbird’s heart beats over 1,200 times a minute.
core_fact: In flight, some hummingbirds’ hearts beat more than 1,200 times per minute.
status_column: Idea Pool - Batch2 screened; hold for MG-lane test
visual: Hummingbird hover/feed (WAN), plus optional subtle pulsing-rhythm overlay or audio heartbeat to sell the number.
risk: Low-medium. The number needs a felt beat; use audio/rhythm, not an anatomy cutaway.
source_policy: Use Higgsfield free/Ultra models for source frames; generate multiple candidates; no metered paid video without explicit approval.

must: no internal-anatomy/process beat as core visual
